articles.title: Top US general meets with Cuban military officials near Guantanamo Bay - USA Today
articles.snippet: WASHINGTON — The top U.S. general overseeing forces in Latin America held a rare meeting on May 29 with senior Cuban military officials at the perimeter of U.S. Naval Station Guantanamo Bay, Cuba, the U.S. military said, confirming a Reuters story. articles.title: Top US general meets Cuban military officials at edge of Guantanamo Bay - The Jerusalem Post
articles.snippet: ## Donovan's meeting in Cuba is the first in recent memory by a head of Southern Command and comes amid growing concerns in Cuba of a possible US military attack on the Communist-run island.
